title: Birthright citizenship battle returns to Congress
shortDescription: A Republican senator is reviving Trump's push to restrict birthright citizenship with a new bill just weeks after a Supreme Court defeat.

title: E. Jean Carroll finally gets payout from Trump, references Apollo 11
shortDescription: With Trump payment secured, E. Jean Carroll echoed Neil Armstrong's words to mission control just before he became first human to walk on the moon.

title: Trump-backed bill to ban the time change passes US House
shortDescription: Supporters of the bill said later sunsets for part of the year would have a positive impact on sleep schedules and the economy.

title: Trump targets leaks with subpoenas. How the First Amendment applies
shortDescription: Experts and press advocates characterized the administration's efforts to crack down on leaks as an escalation that could violate the First Amendment.

title: Trump's polling struggles continue as approval rating remains low
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating is hovering near record lows in a new Economist/YouGov poll conducted between July 10-13.

title: See photos of Lindsey Graham's sister being sworn in to his Senate seat
shortDescription: After Lindsey Graham’s death, his sister Darline Graham Nordone took the oath to fill the remainder of his Senate term.

title: Trump says primetime address will focus on 'free and fair elections'
shortDescription: President Trump said he will discuss "free and fair elections" in Thursday's primetime address, signaling he's likely to revisit the 2020 election.

title: E. Jean Carroll receives $5.6M after Trump appeal
shortDescription: More than $5.6 million, including interest, was disbursed from President Trump after being held liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

title: Trump: FBI is 'wasting their time' looking into Lindsey Graham's death
shortDescription: Trump has previously said that he might have been the last person to speak to South Carolina Sen. Lindsey Graham on the phone before his death.

title: Trump backs off plan for fees at Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: President Donald Trump backed off a plan to charge tolls in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump says FBI should not look into Lindsey Graham
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told the press he doesn't think the FBI should investigate Lindsey Graham's death.

title: Bill to make daylight saving time permanent advances in House
shortDescription: The House Rules Committee advanced the Sunshine Protection Act of 2025. See the next steps for the permanent daylight saving time bill to become law.

title: E. Jean Carroll gets $5.6M from Trump for sex abuse, defamation
shortDescription: E. Jean Carroll received more than $5.6 million from Donald Trump, three years after a jury held Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming her.

title: Trump news, schedule and updates for today July 14
shortDescription: Trump said it was a 'fabulous tribute' to Lindsey Graham to have his sister fill his seat. Trump announced a speech. See more Trump news for July 14.

title: Ossoff says Trump's 'obsession' with GA elections is about Black voters
shortDescription: President Trump is expected to give remarks Thursday about alleged fraud in the 2020 election, while GA Senator Jon Ossoff has called out 'obsession.'

title: Are progressive Democrats dooming the party for the midterms? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Democratic leaders are concerned that the momentum from Democratic socialists will be used by the GOP to paint the entire party as liberal activists.

title: New York man charged with threatening Donald Trump Jr.
shortDescription: A Rochester man faces federal charges after allegedly threatening to kill Donald Trump Jr. during a podcast livestream.

title: Are progressive Democrats dooming the party for the midterms?
shortDescription: Democratic leaders are concerned that the momentum from Democratic socialists will be used by the GOP to paint the entire party as liberal activists.

title: Why Lindsey Graham's death puts Trump priorities in jeopardy
shortDescription: Congress just lost arguably its most effective liaison with President Trump.

title: In Iowa, Buttigieg leaves door open to potential 2028 White House bid
shortDescription: The winner of the 2020 Iowa Democratic caucuses offered a one-word response when asked if he would rule out a 2028 White House run: "Nope."

title: From disabilities services to US Senate: Who is Lindsey Graham's sister?
shortDescription: Lindsey Graham's sister helped on his campaigns during her career in disabilities services. Now she's South Carolina's next U.S. senator.
